# scomp-link

> End-to-end ML toolkit with 25 CLI commands, 39 chart types, and MCP server for AI agent integration.

scomp-link automates the complete ML workflow: data profiling → preprocessing → feature engineering → model selection → training → tuning → validation → explainability → monitoring → deployment. It provides a Python API, a full-featured CLI, and an MCP server for structured agent tool calls.

## Documentation

- [README](https://github.com/GiacomoSaccaggi/scomp_link/blob/main/README.md): Overview, installation, quick start
- [CLI Reference](https://github.com/GiacomoSaccaggi/scomp_link/blob/main/docs/cli.md): All 25 commands with arguments and examples
- [Python API](https://github.com/GiacomoSaccaggi/scomp_link/blob/main/docs/API_REFERENCE.md): Programmatic usage (Pipeline, Artifact, Models, Validation)
- [Visualization Guide](https://github.com/GiacomoSaccaggi/scomp_link/blob/main/docs/visualization.md): 39 chart types (Plotly, RAWGraphs SVG, Highcharts)
- [Agent Integration](https://github.com/GiacomoSaccaggi/scomp_link/blob/main/AGENT_INTEGRATION.md): MCP server setup + SKILL.md for Claude/Kiro/Cursor
- [Quick Start](https://github.com/GiacomoSaccaggi/scomp_link/blob/main/docs/quickstart.md): Getting started in 5 minutes
- [Examples](https://github.com/GiacomoSaccaggi/scomp_link/blob/main/docs/examples.md): 34 runnable example scripts

## API Reference

- [Pipeline](https://github.com/GiacomoSaccaggi/scomp_link/blob/main/docs/api/pipeline.md): ScompLinkPipeline orchestrator
- [Models](https://github.com/GiacomoSaccaggi/scomp_link/blob/main/docs/api/models.md): RegressorOptimizer, ClassifierOptimizer, AnomalyDetector, Forecaster
- [Preprocessing](https://github.com/GiacomoSaccaggi/scomp_link/blob/main/docs/api/preprocessing.md): Preprocessor, FeatureEngineer, DataQualityReport
- [Validation](https://github.com/GiacomoSaccaggi/scomp_link/blob/main/docs/api/validation.md): Validator, AdvancedCV, FairnessMetrics
- [Monitoring](https://github.com/GiacomoSaccaggi/scomp_link/blob/main/docs/api/monitoring.md): DriftDetector
- [Explainability](https://github.com/GiacomoSaccaggi/scomp_link/blob/main/docs/api/explainability.md): ShapExplainer, LimeExplainer
- [Persistence](https://github.com/GiacomoSaccaggi/scomp_link/blob/main/docs/api/persistence.md): ScompArtifact (.scomp format)
- [Visualization](https://github.com/GiacomoSaccaggi/scomp_link/blob/main/docs/api/visualization.md): ScompLinkHTMLReport, Plotly, RAWGraphs, Highcharts
- [Tuning](https://github.com/GiacomoSaccaggi/scomp_link/blob/main/docs/api/tuning.md): OptunaOptimizer, HalvingSearchOptimizer

## Optional

- [Changelog](https://github.com/GiacomoSaccaggi/scomp_link/blob/main/docs/changelog.md): Version history
- [Workflow Patterns](https://github.com/GiacomoSaccaggi/scomp_link/blob/main/skills/scomp-link/references/workflow-patterns.md): Common usage patterns
- [SKILL.md](https://github.com/GiacomoSaccaggi/scomp_link/blob/main/skills/scomp-link/SKILL.md): Agent skill specification
